summary: Made the seller platform agreement a real electronically-signed PDF and confirmed/strengthened KYC gating. Backend: new SellerContractPdfService renders the contract XHTML to a PDF via Flying Saucer/OpenPDF (registers a Unicode TTF font for Vietnamese, with cross-platform font fallbacks), stored under ${app.upload.dir}/contracts and served at /uploads/contracts/seller_agreement_user_{id}.pdf; ContractServiceImpl.signSellerContract now injects UserRepository + the PDF service, generates the PDF on first signing (and regenerates for legacy rows whose fileUrl is not a .pdf), keeping idempotency. Frontend: KYC page and staff kyc-review page now show a 'Xem hợp đồng (PDF)' link using resolveApiUrl(contract.fileUrl); the auction-room page now shows an explicit 'Cần xác thực KYC' notice (link to /kyc) when eligibility.kycVerified === false. Added i18n keys kycRequiredTitle/kycRequiredDesc/btnGoToKyc (vi+en). Verified existing KYC gating: backend KycGuard already enforces KYC on bidding (AuctionController) and deposit (DepositController); frontend already gates deposit (eligibility.kycVerified) and selling (useKycStatus on post-item). Backend compiles; no frontend lint errors; i18n JSON validated.
current_status: Seller contract is now a real PDF (viewable by seller and staff). KYC-gating for main functions (deposit, bidding, selling) is confirmed in place across backend + frontend, with a clearer KYC notice added in the auction room. Pending: a Unicode TTF font must exist on the host for perfect Vietnamese rendering (Windows Arial path is included); restart backend to pick up changes.
